### Steward Health Care Files for BK; Another value-based care operator may follow it.

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_28,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLockFullIcon%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D28%26strokeWidth%3D3.6)

May 15

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideHeart%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4&post_id=144362338&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxNjI4MTA3MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ0MzYyMzM4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcxNTc3NDg3MSwiZXhwIjoxNzE4MzY2ODcxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NyO-LDGlzkwszq0nncKs2B7g4uBLB9RarQyZUb7mLMk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=9oyk0)[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideComments%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4&post_id=144362338&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxNjI4MTA3MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ0MzYyMzM4LCJpYXQiOjE3MTU3NzQ4NzEsImV4cCI6MTcxODM2Njg3MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.F9lMPH0BOw9Un74OHAtD8ZUwoPlZ_KFt_g1gj4qinx0&r=9oyk0&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideShare2%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4&post_id=144362338&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=9oyk0&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxNjI4MTA3MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ0MzYyMzM4LCJpYXQiOjE3MTU3NzQ4NzEsImV4cCI6MTcxODM2Njg3MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.F9lMPH0BOw9Un74OHAtD8ZUwoPlZ_KFt_g1gj4qinx0)[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FNoteForwardIcon%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack..XtJTWk3dCN3C3x8eiyTa_ytqojdft0Ur7v1xpoZSZSs?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)[READ IN APP![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideArrowUpRight%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://open.substack.com/pub/petition/p/healthcare-distress-looks-vigorous?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)

On May 6th, 2024 **Steward Health Care System LLC** (“Steward”) and 166 affiliates (together, the “debtors”) filed chapter 11 bankruptcy cases in the Southern District of Texas (**Judge Lopez**); it operates 31 hospitals and over 400 facility locations across 10 states through its network of 4,500 primary and specialty care physicians, making it “*…the largest private, physician-owned health care network in the United States, providing care to more than two million patients annually.*” And the world was taken by surprise by the filing!

Just kidding. Literally nobody was taken by surprise by the filing: ...
